headline: Ecolab Report Links Sustainability Progress Digital Growth And Valuation Debate
summary: Ecolab (NYSE:ECL) has released its 2025 Growth & Impact Report. The report highlights sustainability progress, including reductions in emissions and water use, and continued digital development across global operations. The update outlines how environmental and social efforts connect to Ecolab's broader business strategy. Ecolab, a global provider of water, hygiene, and antimicrobial technologies and services, is increasingly tying its business model to measurable sustainability outcomes...

headline: Ecolab (ECL) Among BofA’s List of Companies Set to Benefit from AI Data Center Buildout
summary: ​Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) ranks among our Best Liquid Cooling Stocks to Buy for AI Data Centers. The company acts as a global provider of water, hygiene, and infection‑prevention solutions that protect people and critical resources such as water and energy.
